name: Learning About Learning: A Path from Spin Glasses to Artificial Intelligence

description: arXiv:2601.07635v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: The Hopfield model, originally inspired by spin glasses, occupies a central place at the intersection of statistical mechanics, neural networks, and artificial intelligence. Despite its conceptual simplicity and broad applicability, it is rarely integrated into the undergraduate physics curriculum. We present the Hopfield model as a peda...
author: Denis D. Caprioti, Matheus Haas, Constantino F. Vasconcelos, Mauricio Girardi-Schappo
